text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the Satsuki Sho, the first race of the
Classics.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Curses abound! O, woe is me! Woe is me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...And Gold Ship is beside herself for some
reason!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Why?! Why does it have to be like this?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
How dare you ask me that! There's only one
reason why I'd be so distraught!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: But it makes no sense! "Satsuki" is "May" on the old Japanese calendar, and it's April right now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
The audacity! The disrespect! How dare they
spurn April?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Did they ever stop to consider April's feelings?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I tell you, I won't stand for it! I'll win today's race
for April's sake, no matter what it takes!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
And when I do, I'm renaming it to "Uzuki Sho" to
match the old Japanese calendar!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, the Satsuki Sho was originally held in
May... but Gold Ship storms off before I can
explain.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, she sure is motivated. I'm sure today's
race will go well! Probably!
